what_it_does: It is a ledger metadata stub for a design-source JPEG image asset named p-07 under recent-pitches, recording its content address, channel, path, MIME type, authorship, creation time, and asserting it is a SOURCE design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, dimensions, source, author_session, created, and empty links.
The image dimensions w and h are both 0 despite the file being an image/jpeg.
The address uses the image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-07 URI scheme.
The body line repeats 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-07.jpg'.
links is an empty list, so no explicit relationships to other ledger entries are recorded.
standouts: Image dimensions are zero, which is unusual for an image record.
Content-addressed blob reference is the main payload of the file.
Both the frontmatter source field and the body text assert ground-truth status.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of ledger fields.
Uses image:// channel/path URI for the asset address.
Uses snake_case keys such as author_session and created.
concerns: w and h are 0, suggesting missing or unextracted image dimensions.
No descriptive text, alt text, or content summary for the image.
links is empty, leaving the asset isolated from related pitches or design artifacts.
notes: A ledger stub for a JPEG pitch image with zero dimensions, no outgoing links, and a content-addressed blob reference.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual or conceptual content does p-07 represent?
Why are there no links to related pitch or design entries?
What does the source value design_source_material specifically certify?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a SOURCE design ground-truth image; the file does that as a catalog entry, but it is incomplete because it lacks dimensions and relationships.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register a specific pitch image as an authoritative, addressable design-source artifact that other parts of the system can reference or fuse.
contribution: It contributes a stable, content-addressed pointer to a pitch image blob plus minimal provenance metadata, which a fused system could use to resolve and identify the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for the JPEG image asset recent-pitches/p-07 in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:d4098bc76ee088f8ba08914958ae0b4b, with zero width/height, empty links, and a ground-truth source assertion.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design-source pitch image as a stable, content-addressed ground-truth artifact for downstream reference.
